author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(deps): force a lower version of qs (#4805)
body: While this means it will be deduplicated less if people do use the later version of qs, it means a significant bundle size impact if we would have upgraded to 6.10+ (https://bundlephobia.com/package/qs@6.10.1 / https://github.com/ljharb/qs/issues/404)
